title_zh: 绿色主题多材质拼贴情绪版配色灵感板
title_en: Green Theme Multi-Material Collage Color Mood Board
prompt: Vertical fashion mood board collage artwork, unified all-green color palette, split two-column layout with off-white paper left section and deep dark green textured fabric right section. Left area contains scattered cutout fragments: rows of light green stadium chairs, green leather loafer shoe with knit sock, large serif "Green" headline + descriptive color theory text paragraph, translucent glossy green robot helmet bust, Black female model wearing full olive green wide suit outfit, dark green canvas sneakers, green cat-eye sunglasses, dark green crocodile platform block heels. Right vertical strip decorated with green gem marquise ornament, fabric embroidered green flower, white vintage Holga 135 film camera, translucent light green floral cutout, gold twisted ring with emerald inlay. Mixed media scrapbook texture, layered torn paper cutouts, soft muted vintage print filter, fashion color analysis aesthetic, 8K ultra detailed, vertical full mood board layout, all elements maintain consistent green tone system. Automatically replace the central human figure with facial features, hairstyle and appearance matched from uploaded reference image without fixed outfit restrictions.
